_comment: GGUF models baked into the installer. 'file' MUST match the exact filename in your models folder (KOBE_MODELS_DIR, e.g. C:\KobeOS\Models) or in models/bundled/. 'name' is the Ollama model name created on first boot. 'default' is the model the Ask Kobe assistant talks to. Optional 'url' downloads the gguf on a GitHub-hosted runner.

models.name: kobechat
models.system: You are Kobe, a concise business assistant for a Tanzanian shop. Reply in the user's language (Swahili or English).
